# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents a formal benchmark preprint with explicit empirical results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a research manuscript introducing SWE-Bench Pro, gives concrete benchmark construction details, reports dataset size and composition, and includes measured Pass@1 results for multiple models on public and commercial sets. That is real experimental substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents a formal benchmark preprint with explicit empirical results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a research manuscript introducing SWE-Bench Pro, gives concrete benchmark construction details, reports dataset size and composition, and includes measured Pass@1 results for multiple models on public and commercial sets. That is real experimental substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits

This is a preprint rather than a formal published paper, and part of the benchmark evidence depends on held-out and commercial subsets whose underlying problems are not publicly accessible.

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents a formal benchmark preprint with explicit empirical results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a research manuscript introducing SWE-Bench Pro, gives concrete benchmark construction details, reports dataset size and composition, and includes measured Pass@1 results for multiple models on public and commercial sets. That is real experimental substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits

This is a preprint rather than a formal published paper, and part of the benchmark evidence depends on held-out and commercial subsets whose underlying problems are not publicly accessible.
